query:
-- Boost wins for both participants
SELECT participantId, displayName, COUNT(*) as boostCount, SUM(pointsAwarded) as boostPoints 
FROM boost_wins 
WHERE participantId IN (90002, 90004)
GROUP BY participantId, displayName;
